message:
🧹 Consolidate duplicate Condition interfaces + extract named constant (#10331)

- ConditionBadges.tsx: replace local Condition interface with import
  from types/mcs.ts (re-exports for existing consumers)
- KustomizationDrillDown.tsx: remove duplicate Condition and identical
  ConditionRaw interfaces, import from types/mcs.ts
- AgentStatusIndicator.tsx: extract raw 300 → CONNECTING_DEBOUNCE_MS

Removes ~20 lines of duplicated type definitions.

Fixes #10328

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
